title: Khichdi 2
overview: The Parekh family goes on an adventure to save the world with Praful serving as an emperor of a fictional country Paanthukistan. The absurdity, the gags and the silliness return as the Parekh family's adventure transcends various landscapes – cities, beaches, snow-clad mountains, deserts, and caves.
